No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Distribute The Surplus Funds On Deposit With The Court From The Trustees Sale Of 117 Marlin Court #49, San Francisco, Ca 94124 To The Heir Of The Deceased Former Owner
Off Calendar Jul-17-2025 Continued To Aug-26-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: RUBY LEE GUNN'S MOTION TO DISTRIBUTE THE SURPLUS FUNDS ON DEPOSIT WITH THE COURT FROM THE TRUSTEE SALE OF 117 MARLIN COURT #49, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 TO THE HEIR OF THE DECEASED FORMER OWNER

Appearances: Edward G. Operini of the Law Offices of Edward G. Operini (909.822.5041) for moving party Ruby Lee Gunn; No other appearances.

The matter is discussed. Mr. Operini requests a continuance to provide sufficient evidence. The court modifies its ruling as follows: continued to August 26, 2025. Mr. Operini to give notice and provide courtesy copies to department 501. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds And Discharge Petitioner
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP., TRUSTEE 's Motion to Deposit Surplus Funds and Discharge Petitioner.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. The matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all cases arising from foreclosure sales per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
